action.reasoning: Observation: Train crashed on ReduceLROnPlateau(verbose=False) - deprecated arg in this torch version (same bug as prior iters 4/8/10/15/19). Best AUC still 0.7583 (iter17: e=320/h=896/d=0.55). train.py truncated at end (incomplete ES logic) and workspace shows incomplete ckpt save risk. Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT (interaction embeds + per-skill output + masking + ES/clip/scheduler) is effective and val peaks improving (0.759+), but persistent scheduler bug wastes time (~7min left, ~5 iters). Full clean rewrite of all 3 files ensures complete hparam persistence (no truncation), removes verbose, adds robust ES/clip/jsonl-only logging, local /tmp predict validation on val.pt copy before submit. Decision: Use proven best-like params (e=320/h=896/l=2/d=0.5/lr=1e-4/wd=1e-4/bs=32/epochs=55/es_pat=14/sch_pat=5) to target higher val peak/test AUC; rewrite+train+validate+submit_eval on best_model.pt.
